alt_id:(Cut)|Button|Clipboard/Home/Lower.name: Cut
alt_id:(Cut)|Button|Clipboard/Home/Lower.full_description: Remove the selection and put it on the Clipboard so you can paste it somewhere else.

alt_id:(Copy)|Button|Clipboard/Home/Lowe.name: Copy
alt_id:(Copy)|Button|Clipboard/Home/Lowe.full_description: Put a copy of the selection on the Clipboard so you can paste it somewhere else.

alt_id:(FormatPainter)|Button|Clipboard/.name: Format Painter
alt_id:(FormatPainter)|Button|Clipboard/.full_description:
Like the look of a particular selection? You can apply that look to other content in the document.

To get started: 
1. Select content with the formatting you like
2. Click Format Painter
3. Select something else to automatically apply the formatting

FYI: To apply the formatting in multiple places, double-click Format Painter.

alt_id:(Font)|ComboBox|Font/Home/Lower R.name: Font
alt_id:(Font)|ComboBox|Font/Home/Lower R.full_description: Pick a new font for your text.

alt_id:Font|Edit|(Font)/Font/Home.name: Font
alt_id:Font|Edit|(Font)/Font/Home.full_description: Pick a new font for your text.

alt_id:Open|Button|(Font)/Font/Home.name: Open
alt_id:Open|Button|(Font)/Font/Home.full_description: Pick a new font for your text.

alt_id:(FontSize)|ComboBox|Font/Home/Low.name: Font Size
alt_id:(FontSize)|ComboBox|Font/Home/Low.full_description: Change the size of your text.

alt_id:Font Size|Edit|(FontSize)/Font/Ho.name: Font Size
alt_id:Font Size|Edit|(FontSize)/Font/Ho.full_description: Change the size of your text.

alt_id:Open|Button|(FontSize)/Font/Home.name: Open
alt_id:Open|Button|(FontSize)/Font/Home.full_description: Change the size of your text.

alt_id:(FontSizeIncreaseWord)|Button|Fon.name: Grow Font
alt_id:(FontSizeIncreaseWord)|Button|Fon.full_description: Make your text a bit bigger.

alt_id:(FontSizeDecreaseWord)|Button|Fon.name: Shrink Font
alt_id:(FontSizeDecreaseWord)|Button|Fon.full_description: Make your text a bit smaller.

alt_id:(ChangeCaseGallery)|MenuItem|Font.name: Change Case
alt_id:(ChangeCaseGallery)|MenuItem|Font.full_description: Change the selected text to uppercase, lowercase or other common capitalizations.

alt_id:(ClearFormatting)|Button|Font/Hom.name: Clear Formatting
alt_id:(ClearFormatting)|Button|Font/Hom.full_description: Remove all formatting from the selection, leaving only the normal, unformatted text.

alt_id:(CharacterBorder)|Button|Font/Hom.name: Character Border
alt_id:(CharacterBorder)|Button|Font/Hom.full_description: Apply a border around a set of characters or sentence.

alt_id:(Strikethrough)|Button|Font/Home/.name: Strikethrough
alt_id:(Strikethrough)|Button|Font/Home/.full_description: Cross something out by drawing a line through it.

alt_id:(Subscript)|Button|Font/Home/Lowe.name: Subscript
alt_id:(Subscript)|Button|Font/Home/Lowe.full_description: Type very small letters just below the line of text.

alt_id:(Superscript)|Button|Font/Home/Lo.name: Superscript
alt_id:(Superscript)|Button|Font/Home/Lo.full_description: Type very small letters just above the line of text.

alt_id:Font Color Red|Button|(FontColorP.name: Font Color Red
alt_id:Font Color Red|Button|(FontColorP.full_description: Change the color of your text.

alt_id:(CharacterShading)|Button|Font/Ho.name: Character Shading
alt_id:(CharacterShading)|Button|Font/Ho.full_description: Shade the background of the selected text.

alt_id:(FontDialog)|Button|Font/Home/Low.name: Font...
alt_id:(FontDialog)|Button|Font/Home/Low.full_description:
Customize your text using advanced font and character options to give it the exact look you want.

You can add a variety of styles and colors to your text, as well as visual effects, like strikethrough, superscript, and all caps.

alt_id:Bullets|Button|(BulletsGalleryWor.name: Bullets
alt_id:Bullets|Button|(BulletsGalleryWor.full_description:
Create a bulleted list.

Click the arrow to change the look of the bullet.

alt_id:Numbering|Button|(NumberingGaller.name: Numbering
alt_id:Numbering|Button|(NumberingGaller.full_description:
Create a numbered list.

Click the arrow for more numbering formats.

alt_id:(MultilevelListGallery)|MenuItem|.name: Multilevel List
alt_id:(MultilevelListGallery)|MenuItem|.full_description:
Create a multilevel list to organize items or create an outline.

You can also change the look of individual levels in your list or add numbering to headings in your document.

alt_id:(IndentDecreaseWord)|Button|Parag.name: Decrease Indent
alt_id:(IndentDecreaseWord)|Button|Parag.full_description: Move your paragraph closer to the margin.

alt_id:(IndentIncreaseWord)|Button|Parag.name: Increase Indent
alt_id:(IndentIncreaseWord)|Button|Parag.full_description: Move your paragraph farther away from the margin.

alt_id:(AlignLeft)|Button|Paragraph/Home.name: Align Left
alt_id:(AlignLeft)|Button|Paragraph/Home.full_description: Align your content to the left.

alt_id:(AlignRight)|Button|Paragraph/Hom.name: Align Right
alt_id:(AlignRight)|Button|Paragraph/Hom.full_description: Align your content to the right.

alt_id:(AlignJustify)|Button|Paragraph/H.name: Justify
alt_id:(AlignJustify)|Button|Paragraph/H.full_description:
Distribute your text evenly between the margins.

Justified text gives your document clean, crisp edges so it looks more polished.

alt_id:(ParagraphDistributed)|Button|Par.name: Distributed
alt_id:(ParagraphDistributed)|Button|Par.full_description:
Give your document clean, crisp edges by distributing your text evenly between the left and right margins.

Space will be added between characters and words. If the last line is short, extra space will be added between the characters to make it match the width of the paragraph.

alt_id:(LineSpacingGallery)|MenuItem|Par.name: Line and Paragraph Spacing
alt_id:(LineSpacingGallery)|MenuItem|Par.full_description:
Choose how much space appears between lines of text or between paragraphs.

To apply the same spacing to your whole document, use the Paragraph Spacing options on the Design tab.

alt_id:Shading RGB(0, 0, 0)|Button|(Shad.name: Shading RGB(0, 0, 0)
alt_id:Shading RGB(0, 0, 0)|Button|(Shad.full_description:
Change the color behind the selected text, paragraph or table cell.

This is especially useful when you want information to jump off the page.

alt_id:Borders|Button|(BordersSelectionG.name: Borders
alt_id:Borders|Button|(BordersSelectionG.full_description:
Add or remove borders from your selection.

To change the look of the borders, check out the options on the Table Tools Design tab or use the Borders and Shading dialog box.

alt_id:Styles|Button|(QuickStylesGallery.name: Styles
alt_id:Styles|Button|(QuickStylesGallery.full_description:
Styles give your document a consistent, polished look.

They also allow you to use the Navigation Pane and add a table of contents.

If you don't like the look of these styles, check out the Design tab for more options.

alt_id:(ReplaceDialog)|Button|Editing/Ho.name: Replace...
alt_id:(ReplaceDialog)|Button|Editing/Ho.full_description: Search for text you'd like to change, and replace it with something else.

alt_id:(SymbolInsertGallery)|MenuItem|Sy.name: Symbol
alt_id:(SymbolInsertGallery)|MenuItem|Sy.full_description:
Add symbols that are not on your keyboard.

Choose from a variety of options including mathematical, currency, and copyright symbols.

alt_id:(WordArtInsertGallery)|MenuItem|T.name: WordArt
alt_id:(WordArtInsertGallery)|MenuItem|T.full_description: Add some artistic flair to your document using a WordArt text box.

alt_id:(NumberInsert)|Button|Symbols/Ins.name: Number...
alt_id:(NumberInsert)|Button|Symbols/Ins.full_description:
Number the slides in your presentation for easy reference.

You can also add the slide number by clicking in a text box, then clicking Slide Number.

alt_id:(ShapesInsertGallery)|MenuItem|Il.name: Shapes
alt_id:(ShapesInsertGallery)|MenuItem|Il.full_description: Insert ready-made shapes, such as circles, squares, and arrows.

alt_id:(HeaderFooterPageNumberInsert)|Me.name: Page Number
alt_id:(HeaderFooterPageNumberInsert)|Me.full_description:
Number the pages in your document.

You can choose from a variety of pre-defined looks or select your own format.

alt_id:(DropCapInsertGallery)|MenuItem|T.name: Drop Cap
alt_id:(DropCapInsertGallery)|MenuItem|T.full_description: Create a large capital letter at the beginning of a paragraph.

alt_id:(BlankPageInsert)|Button|Pages/In.name: Blank Page
alt_id:(BlankPageInsert)|Button|Pages/In.full_description: Add a blank page anywhere in your document.
